name: Alarielle
description: Alarielle, also called "Alarielle the Radiant" and "Alarielle the Everqueen," is the current Everqueen of the High Elves and the eleventh to rule since the time of the Phoenix King Aenarion many thousands of years ago. Alarielle, like previous Everqueens, represents the mortal embodiment and chief priestess of Isha, the mother-goddess of the entire Elven race. She is the spiritual heart of all Ulthuan and beloved of the Asur. As the Everqueen she is one of the two rulers of Ulthuan and considered one of the most beautiful women of the world, she is loved and worshipped by her subjects.
creator: snip22
